CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-20-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismissed pursuant to CRC 3.1385. Judge: TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-18-2018 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-20-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Dept. 611:
Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D611/Chambers)

Appearances:
Attorneys Linda Ross and Jennifer Zarich of the Law offices of Linda Ross (415-563-2400) appear as counsels for plaintiff.
Plaintiff, Marguerite Hartnell is present.

Attorney Joseph Gharrity of the law offices Hassard Bonnington LLP (415-288-9800) appears as counsel for defendant.
Defendant representative, John Resetar is present.
Defendant, John Velvis, M.D. is present.

Judge Massullo, litigants and counsel confer in chambers separately and jointly regarding settlement.

The case is settled with the assistance of the court. Written settlement agreement is not filed.
